# SideKick PS

> SideKick PS is automation software for professional photographers that connects ProSelect photo sales software with GoHighLevel CRM.

## What It Does

SideKick PS eliminates manual data entry between ProSelect and GoHighLevel:

- **Invoice Sync**: One-click export from ProSelect creates a complete GHL invoice with all line items, payments, and contact sheet image. Duplicate detection lets you Update (preserve payments), Replace, or create a New invoice when re-exporting
- **30-Second Payment Plans**: Auto-generate and enter payment plans into ProSelect — lock in the deal before buyer's remorse sets in
- **GoCardless Direct Debit**: Set up recurring payments during the sale, before the client leaves — available in UK, USA, EU, Australia, Canada, New Zealand
- **30-Second Thank-You Cards**: Send a real printed postcard featuring the client's image via Cardly — lands on their doormat when it matters most
- **Client Import**: Pull client data from GHL into ProSelect instantly — no switching between apps
- **Room Capture**: Email the ProSelect room view to clients so they see their artwork in their space — close the wall-art sale on the spot
- **GHL Workflow Triggers**: Auto-tag contacts, update opportunities, and trigger email/SMS sequences on every sync
- **Xero/QuickBooks**: SKU matching for accounting software integration

## The Problem It Solves

Photographers lose revenue to buyer's remorse and forgotten follow-ups:
- Client says yes, walks out, doubt creeps in — the sale is lost
- Payment plan agreed but Direct Debit never set up — awkward chasing later
- No thank-you touchpoint — the excitement fades and referrals don't happen
- Hours of data entry every evening instead of doing what they love

With SideKick, you lock in the payment plan in 30 seconds, set up the Direct Debit before they leave, and send a printed thank-you card to their doormat — all from one click on the toolbar. Buyer's remorse doesn't stand a chance.

## Target Users

- Professional portrait photographers
- School photographers
- Sports photographers
- Any photographer using ProSelect + GoHighLevel

## Pricing

- £14.99/month (billed annually at £149/year)
- 14-day free trial available
- Windows only (Windows 10/11)

## Supported Software

- ProSelect 2022, 2024, 2025
- GoHighLevel CRM
- GoCardless (optional)
- Xero and QuickBooks (via GHL integration)

## Key Benefits

1. Close the sale and walk away — everything syncs automatically
2. 30-second payment plans — locked in before the client puts their coat on
3. Direct Debit set up during the sale — never chase, never forget
4. 30-second thank-you cards — arrive when buyer's remorse would
5. Change an order? Update the invoice without losing existing payments
6. GHL workflows triggered automatically — follow-ups, reminders, pipeline
7. Get your evenings back — zero data entry
